name: Vitana-X, Inc.
summary: Vitana-X Inc. focuses on providing consulting services for business development to assist companies in going public. The company markets its consulting services through word of mouth, and participation in online forums, as well as traditional print media and online publications in Europe. The company was formerly known as GH Capital Inc. and changed its name to Vitana-X Inc. in December 2020. Vitana-X Inc. was founded in 2014 and is based in Miami, Florida.
